plugin.name: Acid_Test
plugin.author: Mushkin Project
plugin.description: Acid Test -- Lua API Compatibility Suite for MUSHclient/Mushkin. Type 'acid' to run all tests, 'acid list' to see categories, or 'acid <category>' to run a single category.

muclient.script: -- ============================================================ -- Acid Test Framework -- ============================================================ T = { pass = 0, fail = 0, skip = 0, errors = {} } function T.ok(condition, name) if condition then T.pass = T.pass + 1 ColourNote("lime", "black", " PASS ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) else T.fail = T.fail + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) table.insert(T.errors, name) end end function T.eq(got, expected, name) if got == expected then T.pass = T.pass + 1 ColourNote("lime", "black", " PASS ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) else T.fail = T.fail + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) ColourNote("red", "black", " got: " .. tostring(got) .. " expected: " .. tostring(expected)) table.insert(T.errors, name .. " (got=" .. tostring(got) .. " expected=" .. tostring(expected) .. ")") end end function T.neq(got, unwanted, name) if got ~= unwanted then T.pass = T.pass + 1 ColourNote("lime", "black", " PASS ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) else T.fail = T.fail + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) ColourNote("red", "black", " got unwanted value: " .. tostring(got)) table.insert(T.errors, name .. " (got unwanted=" .. tostring(got) .. ")") end end function T.match(str, pattern, name) if type(str) == "string" and str:find(pattern) then T.pass = T.pass + 1 ColourNote("lime", "black", " PASS ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) else T.fail = T.fail + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name) ColourNote("red", "black", " string: " .. tostring(str) .. " pattern: " .. tostring(pattern)) table.insert(T.errors, name .. " (no match)") end end function T.skip(name, reason) T.skip_count = (T.skip_count or 0) + 1 ColourNote("yellow", "black", " SKIP ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name .. " (" .. reason .. ")") end function T.section(name) Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "black", "=== " .. name .. " ===") end function T.fail_error(name, err) T.fail = T.fail + 1 ColourNote("red", "black", " FAIL ") ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. name .. " [ERROR: " .. tostring(err) .. "]") table.insert(T.errors, name .. " [ERROR: " .. tostring(err) .. "]") end function T.reset() T.pass = 0 T.fail = 0 T.skip_count = 0 T.errors = {} end function T.summary() Note("") ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) local total = T.pass + T.fail + (T.skip_count or 0) ColourTell("white", "black", " Total: " .. total .. " ") ColourTell("lime", "black", "Passed: " .. T.pass .. " ") ColourTell("red", "black", "Failed: " .. T.fail .. " ") ColourNote("yellow", "black", "Skipped: " .. (T.skip_count or 0)) if T.fail > 0 then ColourNote("red", "black", "\nFailures:") for i = 1, #T.errors do ColourNote("red", "black", " " .. i .. ". " .. T.errors[i]) end end ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) end -- Platform detection: Mushkin registers NoteColourFore as a Lua function, MUSHclient does not local is_mushkin = (NoteColourFore ~= nil) -- ============================================================ -- Category 1: Variables -- ============================================================ function test_vars() T.section("Variables") local ok, err -- Set and get a string variable ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_str", "hello") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_str"), "hello", "SetVariable/GetVariable string round-trip") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetVariable/GetVariable string round-trip", err) end -- Set and get a numeric string variable ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_num", "42") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_num"), "42", "SetVariable/GetVariable numeric string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetVariable/GetVariable numeric string", err) end -- Get nonexistent variable returns nil ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(GetVariable("acid_nonexistent_zzz") == nil, "GetVariable nonexistent returns nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetVariable nonexistent returns nil", err) end -- Delete existing variable returns eOK (0) ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_del", "to_delete") T.eq(DeleteVariable("acid_del"), 0, "DeleteVariable existing returns eOK (0)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteVariable existing returns eOK (0)", err) end -- Delete nonexistent variable returns error ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = DeleteVariable("acid_nonexistent_zzz") T.neq(rc, 0, "DeleteVariable nonexistent returns non-zero") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteVariable nonexistent returns non-zero", err) end -- GetVariableList returns a table ok, err = pcall(function() local list = GetVariableList() T.ok(type(list) == "table", "GetVariableList returns table") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetVariableList returns table", err) end -- Overwrite existing variable ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_over", "first") SetVariable("acid_over", "second") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_over"), "second", "SetVariable overwrites existing value") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetVariable overwrites existing value", err) end -- Empty string variable ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_empty", "") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_empty"), "", "SetVariable/GetVariable empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetVariable/GetVariable empty string", err) end -- Variable with special characters ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_special", "hello!@#$%^&*()") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_special"), "hello!@#$%^&*()", "SetVariable/GetVariable special chars in value") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetVariable/GetVariable special chars in value", err) end -- Set then delete then get returns nil ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_lifecycle", "alive") DeleteVariable("acid_lifecycle") T.ok(GetVariable("acid_lifecycle") == nil, "GetVariable after delete returns nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetVariable after delete returns nil", err) end -- Multiple variables; list contains all ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_multi_a", "1") SetVariable("acid_multi_b", "2") SetVariable("acid_multi_c", "3") local list = GetVariableList() local found_a, found_b, found_c = false, false, false -- Handle both array-style and key-value-style tables if type(list) == "table" then for k, v in pairs(list) do local name = (type(k) == "number") and v or k if name == "acid_multi_a" then found_a = true end if name == "acid_multi_b" then found_b = true end if name == "acid_multi_c" then found_c = true end end end T.ok(found_a and found_b and found_c, "GetVariableList contains all created variables") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetVariableList contains all created variables", err) end -- Variable names are case-sensitive ok, err = pcall(function() SetVariable("acid_case_lo", "lower") SetVariable("acid_CASE_UP", "upper") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_case_lo"), "lower", "Variable names case-sensitive: lowercase key") T.eq(GetVariable("acid_CASE_UP"), "upper", "Variable names case-sensitive: uppercase key") T.ok(GetVariable("acid_case_lo") ~= GetVariable("acid_CASE_UP"), "Variable names case-sensitive: keys are distinct") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Variable names case-sensitive", err) end -- Cleanup DeleteVariable("acid_str") DeleteVariable("acid_num") DeleteVariable("acid_over") DeleteVariable("acid_empty") DeleteVariable("acid_special") DeleteVariable("acid_multi_a") DeleteVariable("acid_multi_b") DeleteVariable("acid_multi_c") DeleteVariable("acid_case_lo") DeleteVariable("acid_CASE_UP") end -- ============================================================ -- Category 2: Utilities -- ============================================================ function test_utils() T.section("Utilities") local ok, err -- Trim: leading and trailing spaces ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Trim(" hi "), "hi", "Trim leading/trailing spaces") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Trim leading/trailing spaces", err) end -- Trim: tabs ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Trim("\t hello \t"), "hello", "Trim leading/trailing tabs") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Trim leading/trailing tabs", err) end -- Trim: empty string ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Trim(""), "", "Trim empty string returns empty") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Trim empty string returns empty", err) end -- Replace: all occurrences (MUSHclient replaces all) ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Replace("hello hello", "hello", "hi"), "hi hi", "Replace all occurrences") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Replace all occurrences", err) end -- Replace: with empty string (deletion) ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Replace("hello world", "world", ""), "hello ", "Replace with empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Replace with empty string", err) end -- Replace: no match returns original ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Replace("hello", "xyz", "abc"), "hello", "Replace no match returns original") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Replace no match returns original", err) end -- Hash: returns a non-empty hex string ok, err = pcall(function() local h = Hash("hello") T.ok(type(h) == "string", "Hash returns string") T.ok(#h > 0, "Hash returns non-empty string") T.ok(#h == 32 or #h == 40 or #h == 64, "Hash length is 32 (MD5), 40 (SHA-1), or 64 (SHA-256)") T.match(h, "^%x+$", "Hash output is hex string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Hash returns hex string", err) end -- Hash: correct value per client ok, err = pcall(function() local h = Hash("hello") if is_mushkin then T.eq(h, "2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824", "Hash('hello') == SHA-256 on Mushkin") else -- MUSHclient uses SHA-1 T.eq(h, "ac62a630ca850b4ea07eda664eaecf9480843152", "Hash('hello') == SHA-1 on MUSHclient") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Hash('hello') value", err) end -- Base64 round-trip ok, err = pcall(function() local original = "Hello, World!" local encoded = Base64Encode(original) local decoded = Base64Decode(encoded) T.eq(decoded, original, "Base64 round-trip") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Base64 round-trip", err) end -- Base64: empty string ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(Base64Encode(""), "", "Base64Encode empty string returns empty") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Base64Encode empty string returns empty", err) end -- Version returns a non-empty string ok, err = pcall(function() local v = Version() T.ok(type(v) == "string", "Version returns string") T.ok(#v > 0, "Version returns non-empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Version returns non-empty string", err) end -- Version contains at least one digit ok, err = pcall(function() T.match(Version(), "%d", "Version string contains a digit") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Version string contains a digit", err) end -- Version format: numeric like "4.94" or "0.1.0" ok, err = pcall(function() T.match(Version(), "^%d+%.%d+", "Version() matches numeric format (x.y)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Version() matches numeric format", err) end -- GetUniqueNumber is strictly increasing ok, err = pcall(function() local n1 = GetUniqueNumber() local n2 = GetUniqueNumber() T.ok(type(n1) == "number", "GetUniqueNumber returns number") T.ok(n2 > n1, "GetUniqueNumber is strictly increasing") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetUniqueNumber is strictly increasing", err) end -- GetUniqueID returns 24-char hex string ok, err = pcall(function() local id = GetUniqueID() T.ok(type(id) == "string", "GetUniqueID returns string") T.eq(#id, 24, "GetUniqueID returns 24-char string") T.match(id, "^%x+$", "GetUniqueID is hex string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetUniqueID returns 24-char hex string", err) end -- CreateGUID returns 36-char UUID-format string ok, err = pcall(function() local guid = CreateGUID() T.ok(type(guid) == "string", "CreateGUID returns string") T.eq(#guid, 36, "CreateGUID returns 36-char string") T.match(guid, "^%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x$", "CreateGUID matches 8-4-4-4-12 UUID format") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("CreateGUID matches UUID format", err) end -- MakeRegularExpression escapes special chars ok, err = pcall(function() local result = MakeRegularExpression("[HP: 100]") T.match(result, "^%^", "MakeRegularExpression adds ^ anchor") T.match(result, "%$$", "MakeRegularExpression adds $ anchor") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("MakeRegularExpression escapes special chars", err) end -- EditDistance ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EditDistance("kitten", "sitting"), 3, "EditDistance('kitten','sitting') == 3") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EditDistance('kitten','sitting') == 3", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EditDistance("abc", "abc"), 0, "EditDistance identical strings == 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EditDistance identical strings == 0", err) end -- GenerateName (may return empty if names file not loaded) ok, err = pcall(function() local name = GenerateName() if type(name) == "string" and #name > 0 then T.ok(true, "GenerateName returns non-empty string") else T.skip("GenerateName returns non-empty string", "names file may not be loaded") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GenerateName returns non-empty string", err) end -- StripANSI ok, err = pcall(function() local stripped = StripANSI("\27[31mHello\27[0m") T.eq(stripped, "Hello", "StripANSI removes ANSI codes") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("StripANSI removes ANSI codes", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(StripANSI("plain text"), "plain text", "StripANSI no codes returns original") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("StripANSI no codes returns original", err) end -- FixupHTML ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(FixupHTML("bold"), "<b>bold</b>", "FixupHTML escapes angle brackets") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("FixupHTML escapes angle brackets", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(FixupHTML("A & B"), "A & B", "FixupHTML escapes ampersand") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("FixupHTML escapes ampersand", err) end -- FixupEscapeSequences ok, err = pcall(function() local result = FixupEscapeSequences("Hello\\nWorld") T.ok(result:find("\n", 1, true) ~= nil, "FixupEscapeSequences converts \\n to newline") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("FixupEscapeSequences converts \\n", err) end -- ErrorDesc ok, err = pcall(function() local desc = ErrorDesc(0) T.ok(type(desc) == "string", "ErrorDesc(0) returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ErrorDesc(0) returns string", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local desc = ErrorDesc(30005) T.ok(type(desc) == "string" and #desc > 0, "ErrorDesc(30005) returns non-empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ErrorDesc(30005) returns non-empty string", err) end -- Speedwalk ok, err = pcall(function() local result = EvaluateSpeedwalk("2n") T.ok(type(result) == "string", "EvaluateSpeedwalk returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EvaluateSpeedwalk simple directions", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = ReverseSpeedwalk("2n") T.ok(type(result) == "string", "ReverseSpeedwalk returns string") T.match(result, "s", "ReverseSpeedwalk '2n' result contains 's'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ReverseSpeedwalk reverses directions", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = RemoveBacktracks("ns") T.ok(type(result) == "string", "RemoveBacktracks returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("RemoveBacktracks simplifies paths", err) end -- Metaphone ok, err = pcall(function() local result = Metaphone("hello", 6) T.ok(type(result) == "string", "Metaphone returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Metaphone returns string", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 3: Colors -- ============================================================ function test_colors() T.section("Colors") local ok, err -- ColourNameToRGB for known colors (BGR format) ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ColourNameToRGB("red"), 0x0000FF, "ColourNameToRGB('red') == 0x0000FF (BGR)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNameToRGB('red')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ColourNameToRGB("blue"), 0xFF0000, "ColourNameToRGB('blue') == 0xFF0000 (BGR)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNameToRGB('blue')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ColourNameToRGB("white"), 0xFFFFFF, "ColourNameToRGB('white') == 0xFFFFFF") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNameToRGB('white')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ColourNameToRGB("black"), 0, "ColourNameToRGB('black') == 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNameToRGB('black')", err) end -- RGBColourToName ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(RGBColourToName(0x0000FF), "red", "RGBColourToName(0x0000FF) == 'red'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("RGBColourToName(0x0000FF) == 'red'", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(RGBColourToName(0), "black", "RGBColourToName(0) == 'black'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("RGBColourToName(0) == 'black'", err) end -- ColourNameToRGB with invalid name returns number ok, err = pcall(function() local c = ColourNameToRGB("notacolor_xyzzy") T.ok(type(c) == "number", "ColourNameToRGB invalid name returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNameToRGB invalid name returns number", err) end -- GetNormalColour(1..8) returns numbers ok, err = pcall(function() for i = 1, 8 do local c = GetNormalColour(i) T.ok(type(c) == "number", "GetNormalColour(" .. i .. ") returns number") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetNormalColour(1-8) returns numbers", err) end -- GetBoldColour(1..8) returns numbers ok, err = pcall(function() for i = 1, 8 do local c = GetBoldColour(i) T.ok(type(c) == "number", "GetBoldColour(" .. i .. ") returns number") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetBoldColour(1-8) returns numbers", err) end -- Round-trip ok, err = pcall(function() local name = RGBColourToName(ColourNameToRGB("red")) T.eq(name, "red", "Round-trip RGBColourToName(ColourNameToRGB('red')) == 'red'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Round-trip ColourNameToRGB/RGBColourToName", err) end -- AdjustColour ok, err = pcall(function() local red = ColourNameToRGB("red") T.eq(AdjustColour(red, 0), red, "AdjustColour method 0 returns same color") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AdjustColour method 0 (no change)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AdjustColour(0, 1), 0xFFFFFF, "AdjustColour invert(black) == white") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AdjustColour invert(black) == white", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local white = ColourNameToRGB("white") local darker = AdjustColour(white, 3) T.ok(type(darker) == "number", "AdjustColour darker returns number") T.neq(darker, white, "AdjustColour darker changes the color") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AdjustColour darker changes color", err) end -- NoteColourFore/Back (may be named GetNoteColourFore on some builds) ok, err = pcall(function() local fn = NoteColourFore or GetNoteColourFore if fn then T.ok(type(fn()) == "number", "NoteColourFore returns number") else T.skip("NoteColourFore returns number", "function not available") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NoteColourFore returns number", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local fn = NoteColourBack or GetNoteColourBack if fn then T.ok(type(fn()) == "number", "NoteColourBack returns number") else T.skip("NoteColourBack returns number", "function not available") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NoteColourBack returns number", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 4: Arrays -- ============================================================ function test_arrays() T.section("Arrays") local ok, err local ARRAY = "acid_test_array" local ARRAY2 = "acid_test_array2" ArrayDelete(ARRAY) ArrayDelete(ARRAY2) ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ArrayCreate(ARRAY), 0, "ArrayCreate returns eOK (0)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayCreate returns eOK (0)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = ArrayCreate(ARRAY) T.neq(rc, 0, "ArrayCreate duplicate returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayCreate duplicate returns error", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(ArrayExists(ARRAY), "ArrayExists returns truthy for existing array") T.ok(not ArrayExists("acid_no_such_array_zzz"), "ArrayExists returns falsy for nonexistent array") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayExists true/false", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ArraySet(ARRAY, "mykey", "myvalue"), 0, "ArraySet new key returns eOK (0)") T.eq(ArrayGet(ARRAY, "mykey"), "myvalue", "ArrayGet returns set value") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArraySet/ArrayGet round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(ArrayGet(ARRAY, "no_such_key_zzz") == nil, "ArrayGet nonexistent key returns nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayGet nonexistent key returns nil", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(ArrayKeyExists(ARRAY, "mykey"), "ArrayKeyExists truthy for existing key") T.ok(not ArrayKeyExists(ARRAY, "no_such_key_zzz"), "ArrayKeyExists falsy for missing key") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayKeyExists true/false", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() ArraySet(ARRAY, "del_key", "del_val") T.eq(ArrayDeleteKey(ARRAY, "del_key"), 0, "ArrayDeleteKey returns eOK (0)") T.ok(ArrayGet(ARRAY, "del_key") == nil, "ArrayGet after ArrayDeleteKey returns nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayDeleteKey removes key", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() ArrayClear(ARRAY) ArraySet(ARRAY, "k1", "v1") ArraySet(ARRAY, "k2", "v2") ArraySet(ARRAY, "k3", "v3") T.eq(ArraySize(ARRAY), 3, "ArraySize == 3 after adding 3 elements") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArraySize after adding elements", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ArrayClear(ARRAY), 0, "ArrayClear returns eOK (0)") T.eq(ArraySize(ARRAY), 0, "ArraySize == 0 after ArrayClear") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayClear empties array", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() ArraySet(ARRAY, "apple", "1") ArraySet(ARRAY, "mango", "2") ArraySet(ARRAY, "cherry", "3") T.eq(ArrayGetFirstKey(ARRAY), "apple", "ArrayGetFirstKey returns first key") T.eq(ArrayGetLastKey(ARRAY), "mango", "ArrayGetLastKey returns last key") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayGetFirstKey/ArrayGetLastKey", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local names = ArrayListAll() T.ok(type(names) == "table", "ArrayListAll returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #names do if names[i] == ARRAY then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "ArrayListAll contains our test array") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayListAll contains test array", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local keys = ArrayListKeys(ARRAY) T.ok(type(keys) == "table", "ArrayListKeys returns table") T.eq(keys[1], "apple", "ArrayListKeys[1] == 'apple' (sorted)") T.eq(keys[2], "cherry", "ArrayListKeys[2] == 'cherry' (sorted)") T.eq(keys[3], "mango", "ArrayListKeys[3] == 'mango' (sorted)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayListKeys returns sorted keys", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local vals = ArrayListValues(ARRAY) T.ok(type(vals) == "table", "ArrayListValues returns table") T.eq(vals[1], "1", "ArrayListValues[1] == '1' (apple)") T.eq(vals[2], "3", "ArrayListValues[2] == '3' (cherry)") T.eq(vals[3], "2", "ArrayListValues[3] == '2' (mango)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayListValues in key-sorted order", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local exported = ArrayExport(ARRAY, "|") T.ok(type(exported) == "string", "ArrayExport returns string") T.ok(#exported > 0, "ArrayExport is non-empty") ArrayCreate(ARRAY2) ArrayImport(ARRAY2, exported, "|") T.eq(ArrayGet(ARRAY2, "apple"), "1", "ArrayImport round-trip: apple == '1'") T.eq(ArrayGet(ARRAY2, "cherry"), "3", "ArrayImport round-trip: cherry == '3'") T.eq(ArrayGet(ARRAY2, "mango"), "2", "ArrayImport round-trip: mango == '2'") ArrayDelete(ARRAY2) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayExport/ArrayImport round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local keys_str = ArrayExportKeys(ARRAY, "|") T.ok(type(keys_str) == "string", "ArrayExportKeys returns string") T.match(keys_str, "apple", "ArrayExportKeys contains 'apple'") T.match(keys_str, "cherry", "ArrayExportKeys contains 'cherry'") T.match(keys_str, "mango", "ArrayExportKeys contains 'mango'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayExportKeys contains all keys", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ArrayDelete(ARRAY), 0, "ArrayDelete existing returns eOK (0)") T.ok(not ArrayExists(ARRAY), "ArrayExists returns false after ArrayDelete") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayDelete removes array", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = ArrayDelete("acid_no_such_array_zzz") T.neq(rc, 0, "ArrayDelete nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ArrayDelete nonexistent returns error", err) end -- Cleanup ArrayDelete(ARRAY) ArrayDelete(ARRAY2) end -- ============================================================ -- Category 5: Triggers -- ============================================================ function test_triggers() T.section("Triggers") local eOK = 0 local eTriggerNotFound = 30001 local eTriggerAlreadyExists = 30002 local FLAG_ENABLED = 1 local FLAG_REGEXP = 32 local TRIG1 = "acid_trig_1" local TRIG2 = "acid_trig_2" local TRIG3 = "acid_trig_3" local GROUP = "acid_test" local ok, err local function list_contains(t, v) if type(t) ~= "table" then return false end for i = 1, #t do if t[i] == v then return true end end return false end ok, err = pcall(function() local ret = AddTriggerEx(TRIG1, "Hello *", "", FLAG_ENABLED, 0, 0, "", "", 0, 100) T.eq(ret, eOK, "AddTriggerEx simple match returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddTriggerEx simple match returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(IsTrigger(TRIG1), eOK, "IsTrigger existing returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsTrigger existing returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(IsTrigger("acid_trig_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "IsTrigger nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsTrigger nonexistent returns error", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = GetTriggerList() T.ok(list_contains(list, TRIG1), "GetTriggerList contains acid_trig_1") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetTriggerList contains acid_trig_1", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(GetTriggerInfo(TRIG1, 1), "Hello *", "GetTriggerInfo match text (code 1)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetTriggerInfo match text (code 1)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableTrigger(TRIG1, false), eOK, "EnableTrigger(false) returns 0") T.eq(GetTriggerInfo(TRIG1, 8), false, "GetTriggerInfo(8) disabled") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTrigger disable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableTrigger(TRIG1, true), eOK, "EnableTrigger(true) returns 0") T.eq(GetTriggerInfo(TRIG1, 8), true, "GetTriggerInfo(8) enabled") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTrigger enable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(SetTriggerOption(TRIG1, "sequence", 42), eOK, "SetTriggerOption sequence returns 0") T.eq(GetTriggerOption(TRIG1, "sequence"), 42, "GetTriggerOption sequence round-trip") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetTriggerOption/SetTriggerOption round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(AddTriggerEx(TRIG1, "Dup *", "", FLAG_ENABLED, 0, 0, "", "", 0, 100), eOK, "AddTriggerEx duplicate returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddTriggerEx duplicate", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddTriggerEx(TRIG2, "^Hello \\w+$", "", FLAG_ENABLED + FLAG_REGEXP, 0, 0, "", "", 0, 100), eOK, "AddTriggerEx with regexp flag returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddTriggerEx with regexp flag", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddTriggerEx(TRIG3, "World *", "", FLAG_ENABLED, 0, 0, "", "", 0, 100), eOK, "AddTriggerEx third trigger returns 0") local list = GetTriggerList() T.ok(list_contains(list, TRIG1), "GetTriggerList contains trig_1 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, TRIG2), "GetTriggerList contains trig_2 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, TRIG3), "GetTriggerList contains trig_3 (multi)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Multiple triggers list", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() SetTriggerOption(TRIG1, "group", GROUP) SetTriggerOption(TRIG2, "group", GROUP) SetTriggerOption(TRIG3, "group", GROUP) EnableTriggerGroup(GROUP, false) T.eq(GetTriggerInfo(TRIG1, 8), false, "Trigger disabled by EnableTriggerGroup(false)") EnableTriggerGroup(GROUP, true) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTriggerGroup", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DeleteTrigger(TRIG3), eOK, "DeleteTrigger returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteTrigger returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(DeleteTrigger("acid_trig_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "DeleteTrigger nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteTrigger nonexistent", err) end -- Cleanup DeleteTriggerGroup(GROUP) DeleteTrigger(TRIG1) DeleteTrigger(TRIG2) DeleteTrigger(TRIG3) end -- ============================================================ -- Category 6: Aliases -- ============================================================ function test_aliases() T.section("Aliases") local eOK = 0 local eAliasNotFound = 30003 local eAliasAlreadyExists = 30004 local FLAG_ENABLED = 1 local FLAG_REGEXP = 32 local ALIAS1 = "acid_alias_1" local ALIAS2 = "acid_alias_2" local ALIAS3 = "acid_alias_3" local GROUP = "acid_test" local ok, err local function list_contains(t, v) if type(t) ~= "table" then return false end for i = 1, #t do if t[i] == v then return true end end return false end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddAlias(ALIAS1, "n", "north", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddAlias returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddAlias returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(IsAlias(ALIAS1), eOK, "IsAlias existing returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsAlias existing returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(IsAlias("acid_alias_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "IsAlias nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsAlias nonexistent", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(list_contains(GetAliasList(), ALIAS1), "GetAliasList contains acid_alias_1") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetAliasList contains acid_alias_1", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(GetAliasInfo(ALIAS1, 1), "n", "GetAliasInfo match text (code 1)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetAliasInfo match text", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableAlias(ALIAS1, false), eOK, "EnableAlias(false) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableAlias disable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableAlias(ALIAS1, true), eOK, "EnableAlias(true) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableAlias enable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(AddAlias(ALIAS1, "n", "north", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddAlias duplicate returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddAlias duplicate", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddAlias(ALIAS2, "^go (\\w+)$", "", FLAG_ENABLED + FLAG_REGEXP, ""), eOK, "AddAlias with regexp returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddAlias with regexp", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(SetAliasOption(ALIAS1, "sequence", 77), eOK, "SetAliasOption sequence returns 0") T.eq(GetAliasOption(ALIAS1, "sequence"), 77, "GetAliasOption sequence round-trip") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetAliasOption/SetAliasOption round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddAlias(ALIAS3, "s", "south", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddAlias third alias returns 0") local list = GetAliasList() T.ok(list_contains(list, ALIAS1), "GetAliasList contains alias_1 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, ALIAS2), "GetAliasList contains alias_2 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, ALIAS3), "GetAliasList contains alias_3 (multi)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Multiple aliases list", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() SetAliasOption(ALIAS1, "group", GROUP) SetAliasOption(ALIAS2, "group", GROUP) SetAliasOption(ALIAS3, "group", GROUP) EnableAliasGroup(GROUP, false) EnableAliasGroup(GROUP, true) T.ok(true, "EnableAliasGroup disable/enable succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableAliasGroup", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DeleteAlias(ALIAS3), eOK, "DeleteAlias returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteAlias returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(DeleteAlias("acid_alias_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "DeleteAlias nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteAlias nonexistent", err) end -- Cleanup DeleteAliasGroup(GROUP) DeleteAlias(ALIAS1) DeleteAlias(ALIAS2) DeleteAlias(ALIAS3) end -- ============================================================ -- Category 7: Timers -- ============================================================ function test_timers() T.section("Timers") local eOK = 0 local eTimerNotFound = 30006 local eTimerAlreadyExists = 30007 local FLAG_ENABLED = 1 local TIMER1 = "acid_timer_1" local TIMER2 = "acid_timer_2" local TIMER3 = "acid_timer_3" local GROUP = "acid_test" local ok, err local function list_contains(t, v) if type(t) ~= "table" then return false end for i = 1, #t do if t[i] == v then return true end end return false end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddTimer(TIMER1, 0, 0, 30, "say tick", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddTimer returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddTimer returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(IsTimer(TIMER1), eOK, "IsTimer existing returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsTimer existing returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(IsTimer("acid_timer_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "IsTimer nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsTimer nonexistent", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(list_contains(GetTimerList(), TIMER1), "GetTimerList contains acid_timer_1") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetTimerList contains acid_timer_1", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableTimer(TIMER1, false), eOK, "EnableTimer(false) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTimer disable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(EnableTimer(TIMER1, true), eOK, "EnableTimer(true) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTimer enable", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(AddTimer(TIMER1, 0, 1, 0, "say dup", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddTimer duplicate returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddTimer duplicate", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(ResetTimer(TIMER1), eOK, "ResetTimer returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ResetTimer returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(SetTimerOption(TIMER1, "send", "say tock"), eOK, "SetTimerOption send returns 0") T.eq(GetTimerOption(TIMER1, "send"), "say tock", "GetTimerOption send round-trip") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetTimerOption/SetTimerOption round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddTimer(TIMER2, 0, 0, 45, "say timer2", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddTimer second returns 0") T.eq(AddTimer(TIMER3, 0, 1, 0, "say timer3", FLAG_ENABLED, ""), eOK, "AddTimer third returns 0") local list = GetTimerList() T.ok(list_contains(list, TIMER1), "GetTimerList contains timer_1 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, TIMER2), "GetTimerList contains timer_2 (multi)") T.ok(list_contains(list, TIMER3), "GetTimerList contains timer_3 (multi)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Multiple timers list", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() SetTimerOption(TIMER1, "group", GROUP) SetTimerOption(TIMER2, "group", GROUP) SetTimerOption(TIMER3, "group", GROUP) EnableTimerGroup(GROUP, false) EnableTimerGroup(GROUP, true) T.ok(true, "EnableTimerGroup disable/enable succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableTimerGroup", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local ret = DoAfter(99, "say do_after_test") T.ok(ret ~= nil, "DoAfter returns non-nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DoAfter creates one-shot timer", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local ret = DoAfterNote(99, "acid_do_after_note") T.ok(ret ~= nil, "DoAfterNote returns non-nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DoAfterNote creates one-shot timer", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local ret = DoAfterSpecial(99, "say special", 0) T.ok(ret ~= nil, "DoAfterSpecial returns non-nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DoAfterSpecial", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DeleteTimer(TIMER3), eOK, "DeleteTimer returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteTimer returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.neq(DeleteTimer("acid_timer_nonexistent_xyz"), eOK, "DeleteTimer nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteTimer nonexistent", err) end -- Cleanup DeleteTimerGroup(GROUP) DeleteTimer(TIMER1) DeleteTimer(TIMER2) DeleteTimer(TIMER3) -- Delete anonymous DoAfter* timers so they don't fire later DeleteTemporaryTimers() end -- ============================================================ -- Category 8: Database -- ============================================================ function test_db() T.section("Database") local DB = "acid_test_db" local ok, err ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseOpen(DB, ":memory:"), 0, "DatabaseOpen :memory: returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseOpen :memory: returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseExec(DB, "CREATE TABLE test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value INTEGER)"), 0, "DatabaseExec CREATE TABLE returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseExec CREATE TABLE returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseExec(DB, "INSERT INTO test (name, value) VALUES ('alpha', 42)"), 0, "DatabaseExec INSERT returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseExec INSERT returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseChanges(DB), 1, "DatabaseChanges returns 1 after single insert") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseChanges returns 1", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rowid = DatabaseLastInsertRowid(DB) T.ok(type(rowid) == "string" and rowid ~= "", "DatabaseLastInsertRowid returns non-empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseLastInsertRowid", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() DatabaseExec(DB, "INSERT INTO test (name, value) VALUES ('beta', 99)") DatabaseExec(DB, "INSERT INTO test (name, value) VALUES ('gamma', 7)") local total = DatabaseTotalChanges(DB) T.ok(type(total) == "number" and total >= 3, "DatabaseTotalChanges >= 3") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseTotalChanges", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabasePrepare(DB, "SELECT id, name, value FROM test WHERE name = 'alpha'"), 0, "DatabasePrepare SELECT returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabasePrepare SELECT returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseColumns(DB), 3, "DatabaseColumns returns 3") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumns returns 3", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local names = DatabaseColumnNames(DB) T.ok(type(names) == "table", "DatabaseColumnNames returns table") T.eq(names[1], "id", "DatabaseColumnNames[1] == 'id'") T.eq(names[2], "name", "DatabaseColumnNames[2] == 'name'") T.eq(names[3], "value", "DatabaseColumnNames[3] == 'value'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnNames", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseColumnName(DB, 2), "name", "DatabaseColumnName(2) == 'name'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnName", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseStep(DB), 100, "DatabaseStep returns 100 (SQLITE_ROW)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseStep returns 100", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseColumnText(DB, 2), "alpha", "DatabaseColumnText returns 'alpha'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnText returns 'alpha'", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseColumnValue(DB, 3), 42, "DatabaseColumnValue returns 42") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnValue returns 42", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local vals = DatabaseColumnValues(DB) T.ok(type(vals) == "table", "DatabaseColumnValues returns table") T.eq(vals[2], "alpha", "DatabaseColumnValues[2] == 'alpha'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnValues", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseColumnType(DB, 2), 3, "DatabaseColumnType returns 3 (SQLITE_TEXT)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseColumnType returns 3", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseStep(DB), 101, "DatabaseStep returns 101 (SQLITE_DONE)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseStep returns 101", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseReset(DB), 0, "DatabaseReset returns 0") T.eq(DatabaseStep(DB), 100, "DatabaseStep returns 100 after reset") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseReset", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() while DatabaseStep(DB) == 100 do end T.eq(DatabaseFinalize(DB), 0, "DatabaseFinalize returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseFinalize returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local v = DatabaseGetField(DB, "SELECT value FROM test WHERE name = 'beta'") T.eq(v, 99, "DatabaseGetField returns 99 for beta") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseGetField returns 99", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = DatabaseList() T.ok(type(list) == "table", "DatabaseList returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == DB then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "DatabaseList includes 'acid_test_db'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseList includes acid_test_db", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = DatabaseExec(DB, "THIS IS NOT VALID SQL !!!!") T.ok(rc ~= 0, "DatabaseExec syntax error returns non-zero") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseExec syntax error", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local msg = DatabaseError(DB) T.ok(type(msg) == "string" and msg ~= "", "DatabaseError returns non-empty string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseError", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DatabaseClose(DB), 0, "DatabaseClose returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseClose returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = DatabaseClose("nonexistent_acid_db_xyz") T.ok(type(rc) == "number" and rc ~= 0, "DatabaseClose nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DatabaseClose nonexistent returns error", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 9: World Info & Options -- ============================================================ function test_world() T.section("World Info & Options") local ok, err ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetInfo(2)) == "string", "GetInfo(2) returns string (world name)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(2)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetInfo(3)) == "string", "GetInfo(3) returns string (character name)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(3)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetInfo(1)) == "string", "GetInfo(1) returns string (server address)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(1)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(WorldPort()) == "number", "WorldPort() returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WorldPort()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetInfo(54)) == "string", "GetInfo(54) returns string (world file path)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(54)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetInfo(66)) == "string", "GetInfo(66) returns string (app directory)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(66)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local ver = GetInfo(72) T.ok(type(ver) == "string" and #ver > 0, "GetInfo(72) returns non-empty version string") T.match(ver, "^%d+%.%d+", "GetInfo(72) matches version format (x.y)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetInfo(72)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetWorldID()) == "string", "GetWorldID() returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetWorldID()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(WorldName()) == "string", "WorldName() returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WorldName()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetOption("wrap_column")) == "number", "GetOption('wrap_column') returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetOption('wrap_column')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local orig = GetOption("wrap_column") local safe_val = (orig == 80) and 100 or 80 T.eq(SetOption("wrap_column", safe_val), 0, "SetOption('wrap_column') returns 0") T.eq(GetOption("wrap_column"), safe_val, "GetOption reflects SetOption") SetOption("wrap_column", orig) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SetOption/GetOption round-trip", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetLineCount()) == "number", "GetLineCount() returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLineCount()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetLinesInBufferCount()) == "number", "GetLinesInBufferCount() returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLinesInBufferCount()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetCommand()) == "string", "GetCommand() returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetCommand()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetScriptTime()) == "number", "GetScriptTime() returns number") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetScriptTime()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local v = Version() T.ok(type(v) == "string", "Version() returns string") T.match(v, "^%d+%.%d+", "Version() matches numeric format (x.y)") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Version()", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 10: Plugin API -- ============================================================ function test_plugins() T.section("Plugin API") local OUR_ID = "ac1d0e5a00010001ac1d0001" local ok, err ok, err = pcall(function() local id = GetPluginID() T.ok(type(id) == "string" and id ~= "", "GetPluginID() returns non-empty string") T.eq(id, OUR_ID, "GetPluginID() returns expected ID") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetPluginID()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(GetPluginInfo(OUR_ID, 1), "Acid_Test", "GetPluginInfo(id, 1) == 'Acid_Test'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetPluginInfo(id, 1)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetPluginInfo(OUR_ID, 3)) == "string", "GetPluginInfo(id, 3) returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetPluginInfo(id, 3)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = GetPluginList() T.ok(type(list) == "table", "GetPluginList() returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == OUR_ID then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "GetPluginList() contains our plugin ID") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetPluginList()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local installed = IsPluginInstalled(OUR_ID) T.ok(installed ~= false and installed ~= 0 and installed ~= nil, "IsPluginInstalled(our_id) returns truthy") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsPluginInstalled(our_id)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local installed = IsPluginInstalled("nonexistent_plugin_id_xyz_000000000000") T.ok(installed == false or installed == 0 or installed == nil, "IsPluginInstalled(nonexistent) returns falsy") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsPluginInstalled(nonexistent)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(PluginSupports(OUR_ID, "OnPluginInstall"), 0, "PluginSupports 'OnPluginInstall' returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("PluginSupports 'OnPluginInstall'", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = PluginSupports(OUR_ID, "NonexistentCallbackXyz") T.ok(rc ~= 0, "PluginSupports nonexistent callback returns non-zero") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("PluginSupports nonexistent", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(SaveState(), 0, "SaveState() returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SaveState()", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 11: Logging -- ============================================================ function test_log() T.section("Logging") local tmpfile = os.tmpname() .. "_acid_test.log" local ok, err -- Close any existing log first local was_open = IsLogOpen() if was_open and was_open ~= false and was_open ~= 0 then pcall(function() CloseLog() end) end ok, err = pcall(function() local open = IsLogOpen() T.ok(open == false or open == 0 or open == nil, "IsLogOpen() is falsy before OpenLog") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsLogOpen() before OpenLog", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = OpenLog(tmpfile, false) T.eq(rc, 0, "OpenLog(tmpfile) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("OpenLog(tmpfile) returns 0", err) pcall(function() CloseLog() end) pcall(function() os.remove(tmpfile) end) return end ok, err = pcall(function() local open = IsLogOpen() T.ok(open == true or open == 1 or (type(open) == "number" and open ~= 0), "IsLogOpen() is truthy after OpenLog") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsLogOpen() after OpenLog", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = WriteLog("acid test log entry\n") T.ok(rc == 0 or rc == nil, "WriteLog() succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WriteLog()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = FlushLog() T.ok(rc == 0 or rc == nil, "FlushLog() succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("FlushLog()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local rc = CloseLog() T.ok(rc == 0 or rc == nil, "CloseLog() succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("CloseLog()", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local open = IsLogOpen() T.ok(open == false or open == 0 or open == nil, "IsLogOpen() is falsy after CloseLog") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsLogOpen() after CloseLog", err) end -- Cleanup pcall(function() os.remove(tmpfile) end) end -- ============================================================ -- Category 12: Output -- ============================================================ function test_output() T.section("Output") local ok, err ok, err = pcall(function() Note("acid_test_output") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Note doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "Note doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() Tell("partial_tell") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Tell doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "Tell doesn't error") end pcall(function() Note("") end) ok, err = pcall(function() ColourNote("white", "black", "colored text") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourNote doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "ColourNote doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() ColourTell("red", "blue", "partial_colour") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ColourTell doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "ColourTell doesn't error") end pcall(function() Note("") end) ok, err = pcall(function() AnsiNote("\027[31mred\027[0m") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AnsiNote doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "AnsiNote doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() NoteHr() end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NoteHr doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "NoteHr doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() NoteStyle(1) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NoteStyle(1) doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "NoteStyle(1) bold on doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() NoteStyle(0) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NoteStyle(0) doesn't error", err) else T.ok(true, "NoteStyle(0) bold off doesn't error") end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetLineCount()) == "number" and GetLineCount() >= 0, "GetLineCount returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLineCount returns number >= 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetLinesInBufferCount()) == "number" and GetLinesInBufferCount() >= 0, "GetLinesInBufferCount returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLinesInBufferCount returns number >= 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local count = GetLineCount() local text = GetLineInfo(count, 1) T.ok(text == nil or type(text) == "string", "GetLineInfo(last, 1) returns string or nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLineInfo(last, 1)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local count = GetLineCount() local style_text = GetStyleInfo(count, 1, 1) T.ok(style_text == nil or type(style_text) == "string", "GetStyleInfo(last, 1, 1) returns string or nil") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetStyleInfo(last, 1, 1)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local marker = "acid_marker_" .. tostring(os.time()) Note(marker) local count = GetLineCount() -- Try both last line and second-to-last (indexing may differ) local text = GetLineInfo(count, 1) local text2 = count > 1 and GetLineInfo(count - 1, 1) or nil local found = (text and string.find(text, "acid_marker_")) or (text2 and string.find(text2, "acid_marker_")) T.ok(found, "GetLineInfo after Note contains marker text") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetLineInfo after Note contains marker text", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() Hyperlink("http://example.com", "click me", "tooltip", "white", "black", false) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Hyperlink doesn't crash", err) else T.ok(true, "Hyperlink doesn't crash") end ok, err = pcall(function() local count = GetLineCount() if count > 0 then Bookmark(count, 1) Bookmark(count, 0) end T.ok(true, "Bookmark set/clear doesn't error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("Bookmark set/clear doesn't error", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 13: Notepad -- ============================================================ function test_notepad() T.section("Notepad") local pad = "acid_test_pad" local ok, err pcall(function() CloseNotepad(pad) end) ok, err = pcall(function() local result = SendToNotepad(pad, "hello") T.ok(result == true or result == 0, "SendToNotepad creates notepad") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("SendToNotepad", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = GetNotepadList() T.ok(type(list) == "table", "GetNotepadList returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == pad then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "GetNotepadList includes acid_test_pad") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetNotepadList includes pad", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local text = GetNotepadText(pad) T.ok(type(text) == "string" and text:find("hello"), "GetNotepadText contains 'hello'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetNotepadText contains 'hello'", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local len = GetNotepadLength(pad) T.ok(type(len) == "number" and len >= 0, "GetNotepadLength returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetNotepadLength", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = AppendToNotepad(pad, " world") T.ok(result == true or result == 0, "AppendToNotepad succeeds") local text = GetNotepadText(pad) T.ok(text:find("hello") and text:find("world"), "GetNotepadText after append contains both") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AppendToNotepad", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() ReplaceNotepad(pad, "replaced") T.ok(true, "ReplaceNotepad doesn't error") local text = GetNotepadText(pad) T.ok(text and text:find("replaced"), "GetNotepadText after replace contains 'replaced'") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("ReplaceNotepad", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() NotepadReadOnly(pad, 1) NotepadReadOnly(pad, 0) T.ok(true, "NotepadReadOnly set/clear succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("NotepadReadOnly", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = CloseNotepad(pad) T.ok(result ~= nil and result ~= false, "CloseNotepad succeeds") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("CloseNotepad", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = GetNotepadList() if type(list) == "table" then local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == pad then found = true; break end end T.ok(not found, "GetNotepadList no longer includes acid_test_pad") else T.ok(true, "GetNotepadList returns nil/empty (pad closed)") end end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetNotepadList after close", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = CloseNotepad("acid_nonexistent_pad_xyz") -- Different clients return different values for nonexistent; just verify callable T.ok(true, "CloseNotepad nonexistent is callable") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("CloseNotepad nonexistent", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 14: MiniWindow -- ============================================================ function test_miniwin() T.section("MiniWindow") local win = "acid_win" local ok, err pcall(function() WindowDelete(win) end) ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, 200, 100, 0, 0, 0), 0, "WindowCreate returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowCreate returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = WindowList() T.ok(type(list) == "table", "WindowList returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == win then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "WindowList includes acid_win") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowList includes acid_win", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowInfo(win, 3), 200, "WindowInfo(3) returns width 200") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowInfo(3) width", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowInfo(win, 4), 100, "WindowInfo(4) returns height 100") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowInfo(4) height", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowFont(win, "f1", "Arial", 12, false, false, false, false), 0, "WindowFont returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowFont", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = WindowFontList(win) T.ok(type(list) == "table", "WindowFontList returns table") local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == "f1" then found = true; break end end T.ok(found, "WindowFontList includes f1") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowFontList", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local width = WindowText(win, "f1", "Hello", 10, 10, 0, 0, 0xFFFFFF, false) T.ok(type(width) == "number" and width > 0, "WindowText returns width > 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowText", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local width = WindowTextWidth(win, "f1", "Hello") T.ok(type(width) == "number" and width > 0, "WindowTextWidth returns width > 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowTextWidth", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 200, 100, 0xFF0000, 0), 0, "WindowRectOp fill returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowRectOp fill", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowLine(win, 0, 0, 200, 100, 0xFFFFFF, 0, 1), 0, "WindowLine returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowLine", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowCircleOp(win, 1, 10, 10, 50, 50, 0xFF0000, 0, 1, 0xFF0000, 0), 0, "WindowCircleOp returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowCircleOp", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowSetPixel(win, 5, 5, 0xFF0000), 0, "WindowSetPixel returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowSetPixel", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowGetPixel(win, 5, 5), 0xFF0000, "WindowGetPixel returns 0xFF0000") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowGetPixel", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowResize(win, 300, 150, 0), 0, "WindowResize returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowResize", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowInfo(win, 3), 300, "WindowInfo(3) returns 300 after resize") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowInfo(3) after resize", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowShow(win, true), 0, "WindowShow(true) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowShow(true)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowShow(win, false), 0, "WindowShow(false) returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowShow(false)", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(WindowDelete(win), 0, "WindowDelete returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowDelete returns 0", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local list = WindowList() local found = false for i = 1, #list do if list[i] == win then found = true; break end end T.ok(not found, "WindowList no longer includes acid_win") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowList after delete", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local result = WindowDelete("acid_nonexistent_win_xyz") T.ok(result ~= 0, "WindowDelete nonexistent returns error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WindowDelete nonexistent", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 15: Mapper -- ============================================================ function test_mapper() T.section("Mapper") local ok, err pcall(function() DeleteAllMapItems() end) ok, err = pcall(function() EnableMapping(1) T.ok(true, "EnableMapping(1) doesn't error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableMapping(1)", err) end local initial_count = 0 ok, err = pcall(function() initial_count = GetMappingCount() T.ok(type(initial_count) == "number" and initial_count >= 0, "GetMappingCount returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetMappingCount initial", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddToMapper("n", "s"), 0, "AddToMapper('n', 's') returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddToMapper('n', 's')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(GetMappingCount() > initial_count, "GetMappingCount increments after AddToMapper") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetMappingCount increments", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddToMapper("s", "n"), 0, "AddToMapper('s', 'n') returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddToMapper('s', 'n')", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetMappingString()) == "string", "GetMappingString returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetMappingString", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(AddMapperComment("test comment"), 0, "AddMapperComment returns 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("AddMapperComment", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() local count_before = GetMappingCount() T.eq(DeleteLastMapItem(), 0, "DeleteLastMapItem returns 0") T.ok(GetMappingCount() < count_before, "GetMappingCount decrements after DeleteLastMapItem") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteLastMapItem", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(MapColourList()) == "table", "MapColourList returns table") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("MapColourList", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.eq(DeleteAllMapItems(), 0, "DeleteAllMapItems returns 0") T.eq(GetMappingCount(), 0, "GetMappingCount returns 0 after DeleteAllMapItems") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("DeleteAllMapItems", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() EnableMapping(0) T.ok(true, "EnableMapping(0) doesn't error") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("EnableMapping(0)", err) end end -- ============================================================ -- Category 16: Net -- ============================================================ function test_net() T.section("Net") local connected = false local ok, err ok, err = pcall(function() local result = IsConnected() T.ok(result == 0 or result == 1 or result == true or result == false, "IsConnected returns 0 or 1") connected = (result == 1 or result == true) end) if not ok then T.fail_error("IsConnected", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetSentBytes()) == "number" and GetSentBytes() >= 0, "GetSentBytes returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetSentBytes", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetReceivedBytes()) == "number" and GetReceivedBytes() >= 0, "GetReceivedBytes returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetReceivedBytes", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(GetConnectDuration()) == "number" and GetConnectDuration() >= 0, "GetConnectDuration returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetConnectDuration", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(WorldAddress()) == "string", "WorldAddress returns string") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WorldAddress", err) end ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(type(WorldPort()) == "number" and WorldPort() >= 0, "WorldPort returns number >= 0") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("WorldPort", err) end if not connected then ok, err = pcall(function() T.ok(GetConnectDuration() == 0, "GetConnectDuration is 0 when not connected") end) if not ok then T.fail_error("GetConnectDuration when not connected", err) end else T.skip("GetConnectDuration is 0 when not connected", "world is connected") end end -- ============================================================ -- Category Dispatch -- ============================================================ local categories = { { name = "vars", func = test_vars }, { name = "utils", func = test_utils }, { name = "colors", func = test_colors }, { name = "arrays", func = test_arrays }, { name = "triggers", func = test_triggers }, { name = "aliases", func = test_aliases }, { name = "timers", func = test_timers }, { name = "db", func = test_db }, { name = "world", func = test_world }, { name = "plugins", func = test_plugins }, { name = "log", func = test_log }, { name = "output", func = test_output }, { name = "notepad", func = test_notepad }, { name = "miniwin", func = test_miniwin }, { name = "mapper", func = test_mapper }, { name = "net", func = test_net }, } local category_map = {} for _, cat in ipairs(categories) do category_map[cat.name] = cat.func end -- ============================================================ -- Alias Handlers -- ============================================================ function run_all(name, line, wildcards) T.reset() ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) ColourNote("cyan", "black", " Acid Test -- Lua API Compatibility Suite") ColourNote("cyan", "black", " Platform: " .. (is_mushkin and "Mushkin" or "MUSHclient")) ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) for _, cat in ipairs(categories) do local ok, err = pcall(cat.func) if not ok then T.fail_error("CATEGORY " .. cat.name .. " CRASHED", err) end end T.summary() end function run_list(name, line, wildcards) ColourNote("cyan", "black", "Available acid test categories:") for i, cat in ipairs(categories) do ColourNote("white", "black", " " .. i .. ". " .. cat.name) end ColourNote("cyan", "black", "Usage: acid or acid (run all)") end function run_category(name, line, wildcards) local cat_name = string.lower(wildcards[1]) if cat_name == "list" then run_list() return end local func = category_map[cat_name] if not func then ColourNote("red", "black", "Unknown category: " .. cat_name) run_list() return end T.reset() ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) ColourNote("cyan", "black", " Acid Test -- Category: " .. cat_name) ColourNote("cyan", "black", string.rep("=", 50)) local ok, err = pcall(func) if not ok then T.fail_error("CATEGORY " .. cat_name .. " CRASHED", err) end T.summary() end -- ============================================================ -- Plugin Callbacks -- ============================================================ function OnPluginInstall() ColourNote("cyan", "black", "Acid Test plugin loaded. Type 'acid' to run tests.") end function OnPluginClose() -- Final cleanup sweep pcall(function() -- Variables for _, v in ipairs({"acid_str", "acid_num", "acid_del", "acid_over", "acid_empty", "acid_special", "acid_lifecycle", "acid_multi_a", "acid_multi_b", "acid_multi_c", "acid_case_lo", "acid_CASE_UP"}) do DeleteVariable(v) end -- Arrays for _, a in ipairs({"acid_test_array", "acid_test_array2", "acid_lifecycle_array"}) do ArrayDelete(a) end -- Automation DeleteTriggerGroup("acid_test") DeleteAliasGroup("acid_test") DeleteTimerGroup("acid_test") for _, t in ipairs({"acid_trig_1", "acid_trig_2", "acid_trig_3"}) do DeleteTrigger(t) end for _, a in ipairs({"acid_alias_1", "acid_alias_2", "acid_alias_3"}) do DeleteAlias(a) end for _, t in ipairs({"acid_timer_1", "acid_timer_2", "acid_timer_3"}) do DeleteTimer(t) end -- Notepad CloseNotepad("acid_test_pad") -- Miniwindow WindowDelete("acid_win") -- Database DatabaseClose("acid_test_db") -- Mapper DeleteAllMapItems() EnableMapping(0) -- Log if IsLogOpen() then CloseLog() end end) end
